title: VMware platform updates land through Broadcom's release cadence
summary: VMware continues to ship vSphere and vCenter updates through Broadcom's release schedule. Recent updates focus on lifecycle management improvements, enhanced host hardware compatibility, and security patches for the management plane.
why_it_matters: Technijian tracks each VMware release and schedules vSphere/vCenter upgrades during low-impact windows, keeping the virtualization platform current without disrupting hosted workloads.
